name: issue-report-form
title: Issue Report Form
author: mcpcn
description: A compact issue reporting form for team members with categories, impact/urgency levels, and file attachments.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with categories, impact levels and file attachments
changelog.1.0.1: Added aria-label to file removal button for screen reader accessibility
changelog.1.0.4: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.0.5: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.1.0.6: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.1.0.7: Show demo data when rendered without props
